title: hyptis recurvata
intro: Hyptis recurvata, also known as Mexican mint or false pennyroyal, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. Its health benefits include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Hyptis recurvata can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote well-being.
